name: Astria Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Astria Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for rare and niche allergic and immunological diseases. The company's pipeline includes STAR-0215, a monoclonal antibody, designed to provide infrequent dosing options and improve the patient experience. Astria Therapeutics is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.
